name: Course wordlist — Oxford 3000 A1+A2 (+ blueprint additions)
replaces: VOA1500 — abandoned 2026-07-22: it is a NEWS vocabulary (administration/guerrilla/asylum) and lacked everyday words a child needs (breakfast/park/sorry/phone). Oxford is built for learners and carries CEFR levels, which give the course its difficulty ramp for free.
scope: A1+A2 are the course target. B1/B2 are deliberately out of scope and can become a second season.

sourceLegend.oxford-promoted: Oxford 3000 but listed at B1/B2; promoted because the blueprint names it
sourceLegend.added-by-machine: NOT in Oxford 3000 — added by the machine because the blueprint requires it; see note

stateLegend.planned: 已分配，所属课次尚未写
stateLegend.taught: 所属课次已写且确实教了这个词
stateLegend.orphaned: 所属课次已写，却没教到它 — 需要改嫁
stateLegend.rehomed: 已从原课次改嫁到别处（movedFrom 记录来源）
stateLegend.deferred: 曾计划于某课，正文没教到且暂无更合适的课次 — 记录待定，等后续单元定稿时安置

log.action: 蓝图 v3（84 课）点名而 A1+A2 未收的 21 个词入表：Oxford 有的从 B1/B2 提升，Oxford 没有的标 added-by-machine
单元 01 分配：7 课共 138 个上卡词（授课课每课 22 词，〔综合〕课 6 词）。单元 02–12 待后续分配。
